samples.xml_description:
Converts 8-bit data input to 16-bit data output. Clock signal. Active-low reset signal. Input signal indicating the validity of the input data. 8-bit input data. Output signal indicating the validity of the output data. 16-bit output data. Flag signal for the width conversion process. Register to store the first valid input data. Flag signal to indicate when the second valid input data is available.

Reset the data_out register to 0 when the reset signal is active (negedge rst_n).

Concatenate the data_lock and data_in registers to update the data_out register when the input data is valid (valid_in) and the flag signal is active.

Update the data_lock register with the input data when the input data is valid (valid_in) and the flag signal is inactive.

Activate the flag signal when the input data is valid (valid_in) and the flag signal is inactive.

Activate the valid_out signal when the flag signal is active.
